scripts.check:syntax: node --check scripts/init-harness.mjs && node --check scripts/apex-doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/apex-manifest.mjs && node --check scripts/check-config.mjs && node --check scripts/check-portability.mjs && node --check scripts/apex-map-codebase.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/codebase-map.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/paths.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/redact.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/runner.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/manifest-store.mjs && node --check scripts/bench-workflow.mjs && node --check scripts/demo-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-sbom.mjs && node --check scripts/test-installer-fixtures.mjs
scripts.check:minty: node -e "if (!process.env.MINTY_TARGET) { console.error('MINTY_TARGET is required for check:minty'); process.exit(1); }" && node scripts/check-config.mjs --config=profiles/minty.workflow.json --target="$MINTY_TARGET"
scripts.self-check: npm run format:check && npm run check:syntax && npm run check:portability && npm run check:config && npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:demo
